column1: # COPY TO work/lectures.tsv, or generate it: python scripts/build_manifest.py
# Lecture number = LAST digit-run in the filename (CSDA2023-5 -> L05), so
# recordings from mixed years still form one continuous series.
# TAB-separated. Lines starting with # are ignored.
# param: extra extract_pages_scroll.py flags for THIS lecture; '-' = global
#        defaults (the normal case). See README -> "Knobs". It is NOT a page
#        budget — do not raise --ink-threshold to get fewer pages, that tears

column4: handed out as a PDF, not recorded
